title: Linux Sensitive Data Collection from Local System
description: Detects mass access to sensitive system files. Attackers collect data from local systems including SSH keys, cloud credentials, database configs, and application secrets for further exploitation or exfiltration.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*cat /root/.ssh/id_rsa*' or msg like '*cat /home/*/.ssh/id_rsa*' or msg like '*cp /root/.ssh/*' or msg like '*find / -name id_rsa*')) or ((msg like '*.oci/config*' or msg like '*.aws/credentials*' or msg like '*.gcloud/*' or msg like '*.kube/config*')) or ((msg like '*.env*' or msg like '*database.yml*' or msg like '*wp-config.php*' or msg like '*application.properties*' or msg like '*settings.py*')))
